sections.paragraph:
Original: ינה

Transliteration: yânâh

Phonetic: yaw-naw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to oppress, suppress, treat violently, maltreat, vex, do wrong
    1. (Qal) to oppress, suppress
    2. (Hiphil) to treat violently, maltreat

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 873

Part(s) of speech: Verb
